# Lava-SA

> South Africa's authorised distributor of German-engineered LAVA vacuum sealers. Operating since 2007. Trusted by hunters, anglers, butchers, biltong makers, caterers and home cooks across South Africa.

Lava-SA imports and distributes the full LAVA range of vacuum sealing machines, consumables, and food preservation accessories — manufactured in Germany by Landig + Lava GmbH. Every machine carries a 2-year factory warranty and is backed by direct local support from owner Anneke Uys.

## About

- [About Lava-SA](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/about): Company story, German heritage, SA operations since 2007
- [Contact](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/contact): Phone, email, address — Bryanston, Johannesburg
- [LAVA TV](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/lava-tv): Product demonstration videos

## Products

- [All Vacuum Machines](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/products/vacuum-machines): V.100, V.300, V.333, V.400, V.500 series
- [Vacuum Bags](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/products/vacuum-bags): Pre-cut embossed bags, 8 sizes (10×15 cm to 30×60 cm)
- [Vacuum Rolls](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/products/vacuum-rolls): Cut-to-length rolls in 4 widths (15, 20, 25, 30 cm)
- [Containers & Lids](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/products/containers-lids): Acrylic and stainless vacuum containers
- [Butchery Accessories](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/products/butchery-accessories): Knives, scales, hooks, gambrels
- [Sous Vide Equipment](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/products/sous-vide): Immersion circulators and accessories
- [Spare Parts](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/products/spare-parts): Sealing strips, liquid trap lids, seals

## Applications

- [Hunters & Game Meat](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/applications/hunter-game): Venison, wild boar, bird game preservation
- [Biltong Making](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/applications/biltong): Traditional South African dried meat
- [Anglers & Fish](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/applications/angler-fishing): Snoek, yellowtail, trout, saltwater fish
- [Home Kitchen](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/applications/kitchen): Meal prep, batch cooking, sous vide
- [Professional Butchery](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/applications/butchery): Commercial meat processing
- [Catering & Restaurants](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/applications/catering): Bulk portioning, mise en place
- [Food Production](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/applications/food-production): Specialty food manufacturers

## Guides & Articles

- [Best Vacuum Sealer SA 2026](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/blog/best-vacuum-sealer-south-africa-2026): Buying guide with honest comparisons
- [How to Vacuum Seal Biltong](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/blog/how-to-vacuum-seal-biltong): Technique for dry, sliced and wet biltong
- [Vacuum Sealing Game Meat](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/blog/vacuum-sealing-game-meat-south-africa): Hunter's post-harvest workflow
- [Vacuum Sealing Fish](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/blog/vacuum-sealing-fish-south-africa): Preserving SA fish species
- [How Long Vacuum Sealed Food Lasts](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/blog/how-long-does-vacuum-sealed-food-last): Shelf-life data by food type
- [Vacuum Sealing During Load-Shedding](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/blog/vacuum-sealing-during-load-shedding): South African power-outage food protection

## Help

- [FAQ](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/help/faq): 70+ answered questions on buying, using, maintaining LAVA machines
- [Delivery & Shipping](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/help/delivery): Courier options, lead times, costs
- [2-Year Warranty](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/help/warranty): Coverage details, claim process
- [Returns & Exchanges](https://www.lava-sa.co.za/help/returns): 30-day return policy

## Key Facts

- Company: Lava-SA
- Founded: 2007
- Location: 5 Stirling Road, Bryanston, Johannesburg 2191, South Africa
- Phone: +27 72 160 5556
- Email: info@lava-sa.co.za
- Manufacturer: Landig + Lava GmbH, Germany
- Warranty: 2 years factory guarantee
- Price range: R2,500 – R70,000
